description: For month-end reporting, the cost accountant must value the ending inventory.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the list of all inventory items and their on-hand quantities at the end of the month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the physical inventory count.

nodes.task_description: For each item, retrieve its standard cost from the item master file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the standard cost for each inventory item.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total value of the ending inventory by multiplying the quantity of each item by its standard cost.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the total inventory value.

nodes.task_description: Create the journal entry to adjust the inventory account in the general ledger to this new value.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the adjusting journal entry for inventory.
